name: Elven Girdle
description: Although Eraffa is the dominant faith in the Jacinth Kingdoms, the influence of sun worship remains evident even after many centuries. Various solar motifs frequently appear in elven-made trinkets and adornments - this belt's buckle is as fine an example as any.
descriptionZh: 虽然叶拉法现在是红锆列国的主流信仰，但太阳崇拜即便已消失了几百年，其影响依然清晰可见。精灵制作的饰品和珠宝时常出现太阳的各种图案，这条腰带的卡扣就是一个很好的例子。
